'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 103''' is the one hundred third issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[December 17]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*Duel with Dooku
*[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]

*[[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]]
*[[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]
*[[850.AA Public Service Headquarters]]
*Sports and Games
*X-Wing Starfighter
